title: Complaining About Work
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct causative-passive sentences to explain situations where they were forced to do something against their will.
instructions: In this roleplay, a colleague asks why you look so tired. Reply verbally in Japanese based on the English prompts, using the causative-passive form to complain about what the boss made you do.

contentItems.text: For the verb 'to drink', use the short causative-passive form 'nomasareru'.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) I was forced to do overtime by the boss. 2) I was forced to drink alcohol. 3) I am very tired.
scenario: Complaining to a coworker about last night.

subTasks.prompt: Explain the first problem. Say: 'I was forced to do overtime by the boss.'

sampleResponse.targetText: ぶちょうに ざんぎょうを させられました。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: I was forced to do overtime by the boss.

subTasks.prompt: Explain the second problem. Say: 'I was forced to drink alcohol.'

sampleResponse.targetText: さけを のまされました。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: I was forced to drink alcohol.

subTasks.prompt: State your current condition. Say: 'I am very tired.'

sampleResponse.targetText: とても つかれました。

scenarioContext.targetText: つかれましたね。どうしましたか。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: ぶちょうに ざんぎょうを させられました。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: I was forced to do overtime by the boss.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: さけを のまされました。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: I was forced to drink alcohol.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: とても つかれました。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Buchou ni zangyou wo saseraremashita
acceptableParaphrases: Accept 'Watashi wa buchou ni...' for the first sentence.

criteria.name: Nomu Short Causative-Passive
criteria.description: Did the learner say 'nomasaremashita' instead of 'nomimashita'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: ぶちょうに ざんぎょうを させられました。さけを のまされました。とても つかれました。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You perfectly articulated the causative-passive complaints.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the conjugation for 'nomu'. Nomu -> Nomasareru (Forced to drink).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't say 'Buchou wa' for the first sentence. The boss is the one forcing you, so he takes the particle 'ni'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: つかれましたね。どうしましたか。ぶちょうに ざんぎょうを させられました。さけを のまされました。とても つかれました。

hintText: To say 'forced to do', take Suru, change it to Saseru, and then to Saserareru.
commonMistakes: Saying 'Nomaseraremashita'. (This is technically correct but very long. 'Nomasaremashita' is preferred).
